description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 12, 2025 at 3:58 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on 9th Street near Market Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwestbound in the leftmost lane on 9th Street when it began to slow for a queue of traffic for a red light 
at the intersection with Market Street. While the Waymo AV was slowing, a passenger car that was initially traveling northwestbound in the 
leftmost lane on 9th Street in front of the Waymo AV slowed to a stop. The Waymo AV stopped to yield to the passenger car. The 
passenger car then reversed and the rear of the passenger car made contact with the front of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
